title: 8 Proverbs Every Man in His 20s Needs
caption:
Proverbs is the 20s manual they didn't hand you in church.

Not devotional comfort. Instruction. The kind that tells you exactly what lazy costs, what isolation does, and what skill is worth in the long run.

Eight verses. All of them sharp. Most of them will cut you somewhere specific.

Read them slowly. One probably already knows your name.

Save this and work through one this week.

#faith #proverbs #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity #wisdom #mensministry #discipleship
